title: Project Manifest
description: THIN per-Project map header. Project identity + logical base_path + pointers that tie Git <-> Huxley store <-> Mckenna DB. It does NOT contain provenance: all Runs/Versions/Publishes/Deliveries (recipes + lineage) live in Mckenna's DB, and the Episode/Sequence/Shot/Asset structure is discovered by walking the deterministic tree (ADR 0003). See ADR 0002 (store/base_path), 0003 (structure), 0005 (artifact model).

manifest_version.description: Schema version of THIS manifest format. Integer; bump by 1 on any breaking change. create-project writes the current version; a migration map upgrades older manifests.

client_code.description: Short client code, e.g. 'WBTV'. The top organizing folder; NOT part of a Shot's identity.

job_code.description: Job (= Project) code, e.g. 'AWA'. Identifies the Project.

title.description: Human-readable Project title, e.g. 'Are We Alone'.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Manual transitions for now.

base_path.description: Logical, platform-neutral Project root: 'fleet:/projects/<client_code>/<job_code>/'. Each machine resolves this to a real path via Fleet-level config (Windows UNC over Tailscale, Unix mount, macOS mount) — the real path is NOT stored here. Canonical store is on Huxley (ADR 0002).

created.description: ISO 8601 date the Project was created.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date of the last manifest write.

db_project_id.description: Pointer to this Project's record in Mckenna's DB, where all provenance lives. Null until the Project is registered in the DB.
